name: Emma Wilson
bio: Met during freshman orientation. We studied together through finals every semester. She now works as a UX designer in New York.

name: David Kim
bio: My first manager at the company. Taught me everything about software architecture. Still meet for coffee once a month.

name: Lisa Nakamura
bio: Grew up two houses down from each other. Her family and mine vacationed together every summer. She moved to Tokyo last year.

name: James Wright
bio: We shared an apartment for three years in university. Best road trip partner I have ever had. Now raising twins in Austin.

name: Sarah Okonkwo
bio: Colleague from the product team. We bonded over a late-night product launch. She gives the most honest feedback of anyone I know.

name: Marcus Johnson
bio: We met at a local triathlon training group three years ago. Push each other through every race. He qualified for Boston Marathon this year.

name: Priya Sharma
bio: Lives across the hall. We cook dinner together every week and swap books constantly. The most well-read person I have ever met.

name: Tom Baker
bio: Best friend from high school. We were inseparable for four years. He moved to Vancouver for grad school and we have been bad at keeping in touch ever since.
